customManagers.description: Track the stock GraalVM CE pinned in setup-native-build (QD-14917).

Track the qodana/graalvm-hybridcrt prebuilt (HybridCRT) GraalVM pinned in setup-native-build (QD-14925). The trailing <rev> tag segment bumps on every input change incl. MSVC-only security bumps; the MSVC toolset is intentionally uncaptured so those bumps are offered as upgrades.

packageRules.description: Keep the stock GraalVM pin on the JDK-25 line; the next-JDK migration is a deliberate effort.
Keep the HybridCRT GraalVM on the JDK-25 line too; a major-line jump is a deliberate migration (QD-14917).
